InterviewProject.title: Interview Projects
InterviewProject.description: Create and manage interview research projects

createProjectDialog.title: Create Interview Project
createProjectDialog.description: Create a new interview project with a detailed research brief and predefined questions.
createProjectDialog.briefPlaceholder: Describe your research objectives and target audience...
createProjectDialog.questionsPlaceholder: Enter interview questions you want to ask...

validation.briefTooShort: Brief must be at least 10 characters
validation.briefTooLong: Brief must be less than 2000 characters

projectsList.title: Interview Projects
projectsList.description: Manage your interview projects and collect valuable insights
projectsList.createFirstProject: Create interview project to start collecting insights

projectDetails.title: Interview Project
projectDetails.privacyDescription: This conversation was recorded for research purposes. Privacy is protected according to our data policy.
projectDetails.shareDescription: Generate a shareable link for others to participate in interviews for this project. The link will expire in 24 hours.
projectDetails.securityNote: Note: Anyone with this link can participate in an interview for this project. The link will expire in 24 hours for security.
projectDetails.noInterviewsDescription: Share the project link or interview an AI persona to get started

sessionViewer.restartChatDescription: This will clear all existing messages and restart the interview from the beginning.
sessionViewer.autoConversationNote: The AI conversation will automatically begin again.

shareInvite.title: You're Invited to an Interview
shareInvite.subtitle: has invited you to participate in a research interview
shareInvite.description: This interview will help gather insights for research purposes
shareInvite.conversationalDescription: The interview will be conducted in a natural, conversational style
shareInvite.openEndedDescription: You'll be asked thoughtful questions to share your experiences and insights
shareInvite.yourPaceDescription: Take your time to think and respond - there's no rush
shareInvite.privacyDescription: Your responses will be used for research purposes only. Personal information will be kept confidential and secure.
shareInvite.agreementText: By starting the interview, you agree to participate in this research study
shareInvite.loginDescription: Please log in to participate in this interview

sessionChat.thankYou: Thank you for participating in this interview session. Your responses have been recorded and will be used for research purposes.
sessionChat.summaryAnalysis: The interview summary and analysis will be available to the researcher shortly.

reportShare.title: Interview Report
reportShare.description: Professional analysis and insights from interview sessions
reportShare.briefDescription: The research topic and objectives for this interview project
reportShare.viewReportDescription: Open the full report in a new tab
reportShare.previewDescription: Live preview of the interview report
